name: ExtensionEncounterHistory_Class
title: R5: class additional types
description: R5: `EncounterHistory.class` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EncounterHistory.class` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EncounterHistory.class` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EncounterHistory.class` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `Encounter.class` 1..1 `Coding`
*  R4: `Encounter.class` 1..1 `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EncounterHistory.class` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Encounter.class` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `EncounterHistory.class` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `EncounterHistory.class` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
